name: stack_interaction_v1
description: Multi-adapter composition dataset for testing stack interactions, fusion behaviors, and lineage tracking. Tests sequential adapter stacking, style overlays, multi-layer processing, and deep stack fusion patterns with 405 diverse examples.

entries.notes: 405 stack interaction examples testing multi-adapter composition and fusion behaviors

provenance.review_notes: Dataset Type 3: Stack Interaction Dataset for testing multi-step behavior accumulation and adapter composition

intent: Validate multi-adapter stacking mechanics by testing sequential composition, fusion algorithms, lineage tracking, and emergent behaviors when combining multiple specialized adapters in production workflows.
